task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

Three fixes:

1. AGENT DISPLAY: Add functional names mapping and show/hide with full detail on expand.

Add this mapping constant near the top of the component:
const AGENT_ROLES: Record<string, string> = {
  'Gus Fring': 'Safety Check',
  'Agent Smith': 'Translation',
  'Hannibal': 'Sentiment Analysis',
  'T-1000': 'Evidence Search',
  'Tyler Durden': 'Situation Analysis',
  'Joker': 'Challenge Analysis',
  'Thanos': 'Verdict',
  'Mike Ehrmantraut': 'Audio Processing',
  'Bane': 'Location Detection',
  "Ra's al Ghul": 'Commitment Engine'
};

Add state: const [expandedAgents, setExpandedAgents] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());

Update each agent timeline item to show:
- Functional name (from AGENT_ROLES) in bold
- Short summary below
- "show work" link that expands to reveal: character name in gold + full detail text

When expanded show:
<div style={{background:'#f9f9f9', borderRadius:'6px', padding:'12px', marginTop:'8px'}}>
  <span style={{color:'#C4922A', fontWeight:500, fontSize:'13px'}}>{name}</span>
  <p style={{fontSize:'13px', color:'#555', margin:'6px 0 0', lineHeight:1.6}}>{fullDetail}</p>
</div>

For fullDetail use the complete unparsed detail (not truncated).

Add "show agents" / "hide agents" toggle button above the timeline.
Default: agents hidden, toggle shows them.

2. COMMITMENT CARD: Find the commitment text paragraph (the one before "Back this with $5" button) and wrap it in a card:
<div style={{border:'1px solid #e4e4e4', borderRadius:'8px', padding:'24px 28px', marginBottom:'24px', background:'#fff'}}>
  <p style={{fontSize:'11px', fontWeight:500, color:'#9a9a9a', letterSpacing:'2px', margin:'0 0 12px'}}>YOUR COMMITMENT</p>
  <p style={{fontSize:'14px', color:'#1a1a1a', lineHeight:1.7, margin:0}}>{card.commitment}</p>
</div>

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
Agents show functional names publicly
Show work reveals character name and full detail
Agents hidden by default with toggle
Commitment text is in a card
No TypeScript errors
